prompt: Create a moody vertical close-up portrait of a young woman with long, thick, wavy black hair, sitting in a dark low-key environment. Her face is completely hidden by a centered opaque rectangular censor block in a muted dark brown-to-gray gradient, covering from the upper forehead area down to below the chin, while the rest of the portrait remains visible. She is wrapped in a chunky heather-gray knitted blanket or shawl with subtle dark woven patterns near the edges. One hand reaches up into her hair on the upper right side of the frame, fingers partially tangled in the hair, and the other hand grips the blanket near the lower right. Use dramatic cinematic lighting, cool blue-gray shadows, soft highlights on the hair and hands, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, detailed knit fabric texture, intimate melancholic atmosphere, dark background, vertical smartphone composition, photorealistic editorial style.
